channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Telephone Box, 11th March
item.description:
Smashed glass in old phone box. Located on the pedestrian walkway on the Promenade, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: 2 Large potholes, 11th March
item.description:
By 1 Lipson Road. Further pothole approx 20ft from junction with Hester’s Way Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lipson Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

Numerous locations

item.description:

item.title: Narrow alleyway causing users to be hit by school children, 11th March
item.description:
Very narrow alleyway connecting Melville Road and Andorra Way in Churchdown, including the footbridge that crosses the A40 Golden Valley.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melville Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th March
item.description:
Stats Required CWPH 500 x 300 x 47mm Not Marked Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 11th March
item.description:
Please could you jet the gullies which is causing water to come over the carriageway.

On pavement at entrance to Leckhampton Place GL53 0FA

item.description:
Somewhere on the grass verge going into Cheltenham on the A40
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham

item.title: Failed repair again on crossing heading towards the village, 11th March
item.description:
This has been repaired multiple times over the past few months and is not repaired properly so fails almost immediately
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Bramble Chase, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parts left after car went into the verge, 11th March
item.description:
Many months ago car came off the roundabout and entered the verge. Car gone but left lots of car parts which need to be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Benhall Roundabout, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large front car bumper, 11th March
item.description:
Discarded car bumper on roundabout nearly on the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Benhall Roundabout, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very uneven, unsafe pavement for elderly with mobility issues, 11th March
item.description:
The left hand pavement approaching the junction of Clarence Street and St George’s Road. This is a long term issue that is deteriorating.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27a, Saint Georges Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees, 11th March
item.description:
I have some concerns about the tree outside our Property on Christchurch Road GL50 2 NY. We are at number 9. The tree (photo above) has grown very large and is regularly shedding large branches onto surrounding area including our drive whenever there is windy weather. We have lived in the property for over 10 years and the tree has not had any maintenance in that time. I do think some pruning and maintenance is well over due to reduce the risk of damage to property etc. in addition the roots of the tree are causing a trip hazard on the pavement and damaging our garden wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Tennyson Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several massive pot holes causing traffic to swerve al over the road., 11th March
item.description:
Between clock house square and the kilkenny inn. several potholes have opened up and cars are now braking hard and swerving to avoid them. i witnessed a near miss this morning between 2 cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th March
